evalAfter: (async () => { const r={}; const btn=[...document.querySelectorAll('button,a')].find(el=>/Entrar a MOS/i.test(el.textContent||'')); if(btn){btn.click(); r.wizard='atravesado';} await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,2500)); try{ MOS.nav('catalogo'); }catch(e){ r.navErr=e.message; } await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,5000)); const inp=document.getElementById('searchCatalogo'); if(inp){ inp.value='ajonjoli'; MOS.filterCatalogo(); } await new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,1500)); window.scrollTo(0,0); r.cardsVisibles=document.querySelectorAll('.cat-card').length; const c1=document.querySelector('.cat-card'); r.primerCard=c1?(c1.querySelector('.cat-nombre-edit')?.textContent||'').slice(0,40):null; return r; })()
